message:
fix: remove dead probeStale code, deduplicate noms LOCK cleanup (#2059 follow-up)

PR #2059 removed the only production call site for probeStale() but left
the function and its tests. Remove the dead code and replace the inline
noms LOCK cleanup in doctor/fix with a call to the shared
dolt.CleanStaleNomsLocks helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
